title: Nursery Rhyme. DCIX. Local.
content:
Cripple Dick upon a stick,
            And Sandy on a sow,
        Riding away to Galloway,
            To buy a pound o' woo.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCIX. Local."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
